title: LEFT JOIN with virtual table on left hand side may not return all rows
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT NOT NULL, b VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t2(b INT, x1 INT, x2 INT);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES(1, NULL);
INSERT INTO t2(b, x1, x2) VALUES(1, 0, 1);
SELECT t1.a, t2.b FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON (t1.a = t2.b);
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with virtual table may not return all rows
